description:
FINDING-X — grounding_provenance constitutional-invariant observability.

Surfaces two counter families from shared/director_observability.py:
  - hapax_director_ungrounded_total{condition_id,scope} — raw LLM empty rate, fired by emit_ungrounded_audit pre-synthesis. Scope ∈ {intent, impingement}.
  - hapax_director_ungrounded_synth_total{intent_family} — how often the post-parse synthesis hook had to substitute a synthetic inferred.<stance>.<family> marker for an empty LLM emission.

After the FINDING-X Phase 1 synth hook (PR #1153) every downstream CompositionalImpingement carries non-empty grounding_provenance by construction. The synth counter is the operator-visible signal of LLM-compliance drift — if it rises, LLMs are leaning harder on the synth fallback and the downstream wards start seeing generic 'inferred.*' markers instead of real perceptual-field keys.

Deployment: symlink this file to ~/llm-stack/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/json/finding-x-grounding.json, then restart the grafana container or reload provisioning.

See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-21-finding-x-grounding-synth-design.md §5 for the full observability contract.

panels.description:
Raw LLM empty-provenance rate (pre-synthesis). Fires from emit_ungrounded_audit for every empty grounding_provenance the LLM emits, split by scope. scope=intent is the top-level DirectorIntent.grounding_provenance emptiness (not synthesized — top-level stays as-is per spec §4); scope=impingement is the per-CompositionalImpingement rate (synthesized by the hook).

A sustained high impingement rate is the baseline LLM-compliance problem. A prompt improvement should move this down over time.
panels.title: Ungrounded rate (pre-synthesis, by scope)

panels.description:
Synthesized impingements per second, by intent_family. Every increment here is an impingement the LLM emitted without grounding_provenance that got a synthetic 'inferred.<stance>.<family>' marker. A rising rate or a dominant family signals LLM-compliance drift for that intent category.

Should correlate 1:1 with hapax_director_ungrounded_total{scope=impingement}; divergence between the two means the synth hook and the audit counter are out of sync (should not happen; both fire on the same condition).
panels.title: Synth rate by intent_family

panels.description:
LLM-compliance ratio: fraction of recent compositional impingements that shipped WITH grounding_provenance from the LLM (not needing synthesis). Computed as 1 − (synth_rate / impingement_emission_rate). 1.0 = perfect LLM compliance, 0.0 = every impingement needed a synthetic marker.

The impingement-emission baseline uses hapax_compositional_impingement_total (existing counter) so the denominator is the full impingement flow, not a subset.
panels.title: LLM grounding-compliance ratio

panels.description: Current synth-count total since process start, per intent_family. Useful for spotting which families dominate the synthesis population without waiting for rate windows. Resets on compositor restart.
panels.title: Cumulative synth count by intent_family

title: FINDING-X — Grounding provenance
